entities.name: Enhanced Dial Mapping
entities.context: Framework for calculating relationship depth through warmth and familiarity scores

entities.name: Resonant Details
entities.context: Technique for extracting personal, emotional, and interpersonal moments from conversations

entities.name: warmthScore
entities.context: Metric (0-10) derived from personal anecdotes, humor, shared values, emotional engagement

entities.name: familiarityScore
entities.context: Metric (0-10) derived from prior meetings, shared context, inside jokes, first-name basis

entities.name: relationshipDepth
entities.context: Calculated metric from warmth and familiarity, maps to voice.md scale (0-4)

entities.name: Resonance Pool
entities.context: Structured collection of resonant details with confidence scores and emotional tone

entities.name: dialInferenceReport
entities.context: Report structure containing warmthScore, familiarityScore, relationshipDepthLabel, calculationNotes

entities.name: voice.md
entities.context: Reference document containing Relationship Depth scales and Tone Weights

entities.name: Stylistic Transformer v1.1
entities.context: Function that inspired the Enhanced Dial Mapping approach

entities.name: Relationship Depth Scale
entities.context: Five-level scale: Stranger/New Contact/Warm Contact/Partner/Inner Circle

entities.name: formality
entities.context: Communication parameter derived from relationship scores

entities.name: ctaRigour
entities.context: Call-to-action strictness parameter derived from relationship scores
